conflictBlocks.oursContent: {/* ✅ Live chat is now only opened from the Profile screen */}
conflictBlocks.theirsContent: {/* No global chat button. Live chat lives in Profile only. */}

conflictBlocks.oursContent: import { Redirect } from "expo-router";

conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
import { useTheme } from "../../components/hooks/useTheme";
import { useLanguage } from "../../utils/LanguageContext";

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
// ✅ Live chat should only be accessed via Profile.
  return <Redirect href="/(tabs)/profile?openChat=1" />;

conflictBlocks.theirsContent: const params = useLocalSearchParams();

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
// ✅ Live chat should only live in Profile.
    router.push("/(tabs)/profile?openChat=1");
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
// Live chat lives in Profile
    router.push("/(tabs)/profile?openLiveChat=1");

conflictBlocks.oursContent: import { useLanguage } from "@/utils/LanguageContext";

preservedBehaviors.description: No global chat button in layout - live chat is profile-only
Chat tab redirects to profile with openLiveChat param using router.replace
Chat tab shows transitional UI with translated text while redirecting
Profile screen uses ref guard to prevent re-opening live chat on re-render
Profile screen reads openLiveChat param to auto-open live chat
HelpSupportSection navigates to profile with openLiveChat=1 param
Group chat uses multi-language locale map for time formatting
Profile contains live chat, family children, and transfer UI sections
Group chat supports video/audio calls, message polling, and moderation
